description_long: This sculpture depicts a reclining human figure, possibly a woman, draped in flowing garments and positioned on a long, textured rectangular base. The figure appears to be resting or in a contemplative pose, with one arm extended and the head slightly bowed. The surface of the sculpture is rough and weathered, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal with a patinated finish. The base is uneven and organic, contrasting with the more defined form of the figure. The overall composition is horizontal, emphasizing the length of the base and the relaxed posture of the subject. The sculpture's details, such as the folds of the clothing and the contours of the body, are rendered with a sense of realism and artistry.
description: A reclining human figure in draped clothing rests on a long, textured base, rendered in a rough, patinated metal finish.
description_view_0: The reclining figure is seen in profile, with the head bowed and the body stretched along the length of the base.
description_view_1: A narrow side view shows the thickness of the base and the upright posture of the figure's torso.
description_view_2: The opposite profile reveals the figure's back and the draped garment, with the base extending horizontally.
description_view_3: Another narrow side view, highlighting the figure's head and the vertical dimension of the sculpture.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the background is neutral and does not indicate a particular setting.
